title: Ražnjići
summary: Ražnjići (Serbian Cyrillic: Ражњићи) is a common Balkan specialty of grilled meat on a skewer, equivalent of the Greek souvlaki and Turkish şaşlık. The name is derived from Serbo-Croatian word ražanj (ражањ) meaning 'skewer'. In Slovak and Czech languages it is called ražniči.
text: Ražnjići (Serbian Cyrillic: Ражњићи) is a common Balkan specialty of grilled meat on a skewer, equivalent of the Greek souvlaki and Turkish şaşlık. The name is derived from Serbo-Croatian word ražanj (ражањ) meaning 'skewer'. In Slovak and Czech languages it is called ražniči.
